title: rubus scaberrimus var. oblongatus
intro: Rubus scaberrimus var. oblongatus, also known as the thorny bramble, is a variant of the thorny raspberry plant, belonging to the Rosaceae family. Its medicinal properties have been used to treat various health issues, including wounds and skin irritations, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Rubus scaberrimus var. oblongatus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antimicrobial agent, which can help prevent infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, salves, and infusions, and are often used in traditional medicine to support skin health and treat minor injuries.
